description: Static field declaration via Component.act = {…} → registered on the per-render ActCollectorService by the synthetic walker (mirrors what an Angular standalone-component bootstrap would do via the Ivy compiler-emitted reference). Verifies the binding emits one canonical NodeDraft whose first content block is the marketing:hero from HeroComponent.act, with metadata.extracted_via=component-contract and metadata.extraction_method=ssr-walk.
